message:
v0.3.13: Suppress HOME-not-set warning under systemd

- Remove noisy WARNING logs for missing HOME environment variable
  (expected when running as a systemd service, not a misconfiguration)
- Bump version to 0.3.13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
